skills.name: Cannon Shot
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 times
Skill Range 50
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Cannon Blast
skills.description: Fire a cannon to the front during channeling and give damage.
skills.effect_text:
Channeling Duration 1.5 seconds
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 times per 0.7 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Cannon Barrage
skills.description: Repeatedly fire your cannon at the target. Give damage to the target and the enemies nearby the target.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Stun Duration 2 seconds

skills.name: Smoke Grenade
skills.description: Throw a smoke grenade at a selected area and blind your enemies, reducing their Accuracy and Evasion.
skills.effect_text:
Smoke Grenade Duration CaptionTime seconds
Accuracy, Evasion - CaptionRatio2 %
Number of Targets CaptionRatio

skills.name: Bazooka
skills.description: Change to Bazooka status and change some attack skills of Cannoneer to casting. AoE Attack Ratio, Final Damage, and Cooldown of the skill increases.
skills.effect_text:
Changes to 0.75 seconds casting skill
Skill Range changes to 200
Skill AoE Attack Ratio + CaptionRatio2
Skill Final Damage + CaptionRatio %
Skill Cooldown x2

skills.name: Sweeping Cannon
skills.description: Create a turret in front of you. You can assemble your cannon with the turret to damage a wide range of enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Cannon Mastery: Penetration
attributes.description: * Decreases the chance of attack being Block by 3% per attribute level when attacking the enemy by Cannoneer skill

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Sweeping Cannon: Siege Shot
attributes.description:
* Cooldown of [Sweeping Cannon] increases by 10 seconds

* Destroys the installation created by [Installations] right away

(Can not destroy Territory Wars installations)

* Destroy every [Magic Circle] and [Continual AoE] installed within the range

attributes.name: [Arts] Cannon Shot: Howitzer
attributes.description:
* Changed to firing projectile without inducing the targeting

* Projectile speed will be slow

* Changes the skill range of [Cannon Shot] to 85

* Increases AoE Attack Ratio of [Cannon Shot] by 5

attributes.name: Smoke Grenade: Enhance
attributes.description:
